author: Ingrid K.
text: Chris and Blair did an excellent job cleaning gutters, soffits, siding, windows, and fences. They are great to deal with - and I happily recommend their service.

author: Margot F.
text: After being very happy with window cleaning last year, this year I decided to get my deck, patio and shed pressure washed. I could not be happier. Chris and Blair are professional and very thorough. I would highly recommend them. Our 6 year old deck looks brand new.

author: Stephanie D.
text: We got a window cleaning service from Chris and Blair and were very happy with the results. They are friendly, professional and did a great job. Will be using their services again.

author: Rich O.
text: First time customer and very happy for a job well done. Chris and Blair have a good attitude and provided great communication and after-sales support. Will do business with you again.

author: Laurent C.
text: All my windows are super clean. I got the job reviewed by my wife and normally she always has something to say but this time just positive comments. Merci.

author: Pierre-Marc E.
text: Thanks Chris and Team! You guys did a great job cleaning our gutters and washing our windows!

author: Yulin Z.
text: Amazing and good quality service with super reasonable quotation. Will definitely continue to work with them!
